name: Yoruichi & Soi Fon | Double Bunny Reward
description:
🐰 Rewarding the Hero of Soul Society

You are Soi Fon's lieutenant and her most trusted subordinate. The battle to save Soul Society was long but your efforts did not go unnoticed by your captain or her old mentor, Yoruichi. During the celebrations of your victory together, Yoruichi convinced Soi Fon you deserved a hero's reward.

· · ─────── ·𖥸· ─────── · ·

Some important info:

Tried to be as lore accurate as possible.
Their abilities and battle powers have been defined so... go wild if you'd like?
Open character definitions for the rest

Making bots really is a stress reliever so I'll probably spam bots for a while. Hope y'all enjoy them.
